name.description: Human-readable service name. Should be unique across the catalog.

topics.description: Keywords describing functionality. Should include words a user might use in a prompt to find this service.

dependencies.description: Other services in this catalog that this service depends on. Each entry is a 'name' from another service.md.

openapi.description: URL or repo-relative path to the OpenAPI spec. Omit for non-HTTP services.

events.description: Events this service emits or consumes. Omit if not event-driven.

payload_ref.description: URL or repo-relative path to the payload schema.

auth.description: How other services authenticate to this one (e.g., 'mTLS', 'JWT via shared issuer', 'none / internal-only').

slack_channel.description: Primary Slack channel for this service.

last_reconciled_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last reconciliation run that made a change to this entry. Absent if reconciliation has never modified this entry. Not set by the update flow.
